variants.name: 赫忒斯塔 ✦
variants.ability: 你与一名善良玩家得知你的具体能力是什么。如果一名邪恶玩家死亡，你的能力变为"每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。"
variants.firstNightReminder: One at a time, wake the Hethaesta and the player who *KNOWS* to let them know the custom ability. Run the Hethaesta's ability, if applicable.
variants.otherNightReminder: Run the Hethaesta's ability, if applicable.
variants.flavor: Everything is metal if you try, hit and heat hard enough. It'll all become music to your ears... Take all the damned looks you like, you won't remember a thing.
